traits.name: Adaptable
traits.description: Gains proficiency in one skill of choice, reflecting broad adaptability.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if dim.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and immune to magical sleep effects.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: Does not need to sleep; instead meditates for 4 hours to gain the benefit of a long rest.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: Gains proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Elf Weapon Training
traits.description: Proficient with longswords, shortswords, shortbows, and longbows.

traits.name: Cantrip
traits.description: Knows one wizard cantrip of choice, cast using Intelligence.

traits.name: Mask of the Wild
traits.description: Can attempt to hide even when only lightly obscured by natural phenomena.

traits.description: Proficient with longswords, shortswords, shortbows, and longbows.

traits.name: Fleet of Foot
traits.description: Base walking speed increases to 35 feet.

traits.name: Darkvision

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against poison, and resistance to poison damage.

traits.name: Dwarven Combat Training
traits.description: Proficient with battleaxes, handaxes, light hammers, and warhammers.

traits.name: Tool Proficiency
traits.description: Proficient with one type of artisan's tools of choice.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: Doubles proficiency bonus on history checks related to stonework.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Maximum hit points increase by 1, and by 1 again every time a level is gained.

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: May reroll a natural 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

traits.name: Nimble
traits.description: Can move through the space of any creature that is a size larger.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: Can attempt to hide even when obscured only by a creature at least one size larger.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description: Chooses a draconic lineage (e.g. red, blue, gold) that determines breath weapon and resistance damage type.

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description: Can exhale destructive energy in a shape and damage type determined by draconic ancestry, once per short or long rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: Resistance to the damage type associated with draconic ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: Can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if dim.

traits.name: Gnome Cunning
traits.description: Advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Natural Illusionist
traits.description: Knows the minor illusion cantrip, cast using Intelligence.

traits.name: Speak with Small Beasts
traits.description: Can communicate simple ideas with Small or smaller beasts.

traits.description: Advantage on all Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.

traits.name: Artificer's Lore
traits.description: Doubles proficiency bonus on history checks related to magic items, alchemical objects, or technological devices.

traits.name: Tinker
traits.description: Proficient with tinker's tools; can build tiny clockwork devices.

traits.name: Skill Versatility
traits.description: Gains proficiency in two skills of choice.

traits.description: Can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if dim.

traits.name: Menacing
traits.description: Gains proficiency in the Intimidation skill.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When reduced to 0 hit points but not killed outright, can drop to 1 hit point instead, once per long rest.

traits.name: Savage Attacks
traits.description: On a critical hit with a melee weapon, rolls one additional damage die.

traits.description: Can see in dim light within 60 feet as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if dim.

traits.name: Hellish Resistance
traits.description: Resistance to fire damage.

traits.name: Infernal Legacy
traits.description: Knows the thaumaturgy cantrip; gains hellish rebuke at level 3 and darkness at level 5 (each castable once per long rest), all using Charisma.
